en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid Industrial Waste Collection and Transportation Permit in the Japan Industrial Waste Collection and Transportation Permit Applicability Assessment questionnaire.\t
Japan Industrial Waste Collection and Transportation Permit

The Industrial Waste Collection and Transportation Permit in Japan is a government-issued license mandated by the Act on Waste Management and Public Cleaning, primarily referenced in Article 14 and Article 15 of this statute. This permit is required for businesses that transport or collect industrial wastes on consignment from others and serves as the strongest official proof of compliance with regulatory obligations for this activity. If the company does not have the original copy of the Industrial Waste Collection and Transportation Permit, a copy can be obtained by applying to the prefectural governor (or, in designated cities, the mayor) who issued the original permit. Official application procedure and more information can be found here.
Please upload your Industrial Waste Collection and Transportation Permit.

The expiration date will be clearly displayed on the Industrial Waste Collection and Transportation Permit. The permit is typically valid for 5 years and expires the day before the fifth anniversary of the issue date.
Please enter the expiration date of your Industrial Waste Collection and Transportation Permit.
